# seabirddata

The goal of seabirddata is to…

## Installation

You can install the development version of seabirddata from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("jonthegeek/seabirddata")
```

## Usage

Add usage information and examples here.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the seabirddata project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://jonthegeek.github.io/seabirddata/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.
